judgment.summary: Fundamental visibility is limited to a trailing P/E of 38.21 with no reported growth, margin, or balance sheet metrics.

news.paragraph: The technology sector has experienced recent downward pressure, with tech stocks falling during Monday afternoon trading despite an initial premarket advance. Options traders should closely monitor the upcoming Nvidia earnings report this Wednesday, which serves as a major catalyst for tech-heavy ETFs.
